summary: Pantothenic acid supports essential metabolic functions through precursor molecules like CoA but does so indirectly since it cannot be fully synthesized inside human bodies without some form of dietary intake initially providing these building blocks needed throughout life stages. Niacin has limited direct internal production capabilities compared to other options listed here which do rely more heavily upon regular consumption due their critical role yet lack full synthetic
